attachment.content:
- update-config: Use this skill to configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json. Automated behaviors ("from now on when X", "each time X", "whenever X", "before/after X") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: "allow npm commands", "add bq permission to global settings", "move permission to user settings", "set DEBUG=true", "when claude stops show X". For simple settings like theme/model, suggest the /config command.
- keybindings-help: Use when the user wants to customize keyboard shortcuts, rebind keys, add chord bindings, or modify ~/.claude/keybindings.json. Examples: "rebind ctrl+s", "add a chord shortcut", "change the submit key", "customize keybindings".
- simplify: Review changed code for reuse, quality, and efficiency, then fix any issues found.
- fewer-permission-prompts: Scan your transcripts for common read-only Bash and MCP tool calls, then add a prioritized allowlist to project .claude/settings.json to reduce permission prompts.
- loop: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo). Omit the interval to let the model self-pace. - When the user wants to set up a recurring task, poll for status, or run something repeatedly on an interval (e.g. "check the deploy every 5 minutes", "keep running /babysit-prs"). Do NOT invoke for one-off tasks.
- schedule: Create, update, list, or run scheduled remote agents (routines) on a cron schedule or once at a specific time. - When the user wants to schedule a recurring or one-time remote agent ("run this every Monday", "open a cleanup PR for X in 2 weeks"), or to manage existing routines. ALSO OFFER PROACTIVELY: after you finish work that has a natural future follow-up, end your reply with a one-line offer to schedule a background agent to do it. Strong signals: a feature flag / gate / experiment / staged rollout was just shipped (offer a one-time agent in ~2 weeks to open a cleanup PR or evaluate results), a new alert/monitor was created (offer a recurring agent to triage it), a TODO/migration with a "remove once X" condition was left behind (offer a one-time agent to do the removal). Skip the offer for refactors, bug fixes, and anything that is done once it ships. Name a concrete action and cadence ("in 2 weeks", "every Monday") and only offer when the run just succeeded — do not pitch a schedule for something that has not happened yet.
- claude-api: Build, debug, and optimize Claude API / Anthropic SDK apps. Apps built with this skill should include prompt caching. Also handles migrating existing Claude API code between Claude model versions (4.5 → 4.6, 4.6 → 4.7, retired-model replacements).
TRIGGER when: code imports `anthropic`/`@anthropic-ai/sdk`; user asks for the Claude API, Anthropic SDK, or Managed Agents; user adds/modifies/tunes a Claude feature (caching, thinking, compaction, tool use, batch, files, citations, memory) or model (Opus/Sonnet/Haiku) in a file; questions about prompt caching / cache hit rate in an Anthropic SDK project.
SKIP: file imports `openai`/other-provider SDK, filename like `*-openai.py`/`*-generic.py`, provider-neutral code, general programming/ML.
- omc-reference: OMC agent catalog, available tools, team pipeline routing, commit protocol, and skills registry. Auto-loads when delegating to agents, using OMC tools, orchestrating teams, making commits, or invoking skills.
- Notion:database-query: Query a Notion database by name or ID and return structured, readable results.
- Notion:create-page: Create a new Notion page, optionally under a specific parent, using the Notion Workspace Skill and Notion MCP server.
- Notion:create-database-row: Insert a new row into a specified Notion database using natural-language property values.
- Notion:find: Quickly find pages or databases in Notion by title keywords.
- Notion:search: Search the user’s Notion workspace using the Notion MCP server and Notion Workspace Skill.
- Notion:create-task: Create a new task in the user’s Notion tasks database with sensible defaults.
- Notion:tasks:setup: Set up a Notion task board for tracking tasks
- Notion:tasks:plan: Plan a task from a Notion page URL
- Notion:tasks:build: Build a task from a Notion page URL
- Notion:tasks:explain-diff: Makes a Notion doc explaining a code change.
- sc4sap:analyze-code: ABAP code analysis — read via MCP, analyze with sap-code-reviewer, suggest improvements
- sc4sap:deep-interview: Socratic deep interview to crystallize SAP requirements before autonomous execution
- sc4sap:mcp-setup: Guide to install and configure the abap-mcp-adt-powerup MCP server for SAP ADT connectivity
- sc4sap:analyze-cbo-obj: Analyze a CBO (Customer Business Object) package — discover frequently-used Z tables / function modules / data elements / classes / structures / table types — and save a per-module / per-package reference file so later `program` / `program-to-spec` runs prefer existing CBO elements over new ones.
- sc4sap:trust-session: INTERNAL-ONLY permission bootstrap. Grants MCP tool + file-op permissions for the current session (except GetTableContents / GetSqlQuery, which remain prompt-gated). MUST be invoked by a parent skill (create-program, setup, team, analyze-*, create-object) — direct user invocation is rejected with a redirect message.
- sc4sap:team: N coordinated SAP agents on a shared task list using Claude Code native teams
- sc4sap:create-program: Create ABAP programs (Report/CRUD/ALV/Batch) with Main+Include structure, OOP or Procedural, and full agent-driven coding/QA pipeline
- sc4sap:compare-programs: Business-angle comparison of 2–5 ABAP programs that share the same business scenario but diverge by module (MM vs CO), country (KR vs EU), persona (controller vs warehouse), or time horizon. Reader = functional consultant.
- sc4sap:setup: Plugin setup — detect legacy single-profile state (migrate → multi-profile), create or register a SAP connection profile under ~/.sc4sap/profiles/<alias>/, install abap-mcp-adt-powerup MCP server, optionally install DEV-only ZMCP_ADT_UTILS + ZCL_S4SAP_CM_* ALV OOP handlers (tier-gated), register both PreToolUse hooks (blocklist + tier-readonly-guard), optional SPRO / customizations extraction
- sc4sap:ask-consultant: Direct operational Q&A with a SAP module consultant agent. Auto-routes the question to the matching sap-{module}-consultant and answers against the configured SAP environment (version, industry, country, active modules).
- sc4sap:release: CTS Transport Release workflow — list, validate, release, and confirm import
- sc4sap:analyze-symptom: Step-by-step root cause analysis for SAP operational errors. Uses MCP to directly inspect dumps, logs, transports, and where-used relations, then narrows hypotheses with minimal user questions and provides SAP Note search keywords.
- sc4sap:sap-doctor: Diagnose SC4SAP plugin health, MCP server connectivity, and SAP system connection (renamed from `doctor` to avoid conflict with Claude Code's built-in `/doctor`)
- sc4sap:sap-option: View SAP system status snapshot and edit values in `.sc4sap/sap.env` (connection, blocklist) and HUD usage limits in `~/.claude/settings.json` → `env` — single entrypoint for all sc4sap runtime options
- sc4sap:create-object: ABAP object creation workflow — confirm transport+package, auto-create and activate
- sc4sap:program-to-spec: Reverse-engineer an ABAP program into a Functional/Technical Specification artifact (Markdown or Excel). Socratic scope narrowing from "everything" to "only what the user needs".
- init: Initialize a new CLAUDE.md file with codebase documentation
- review: Review a pull request
- security-review: Complete a security review of the pending changes on the current branch

Comfortable

원클릭 셋업 — /sc4sap:setup

SAP 개발 환경을 꾸리다 보면 MCP 서버 설치 · 인증 정보 분리 · 권한 훅 등록 · SPRO 캐시 생성까지 반나절이 녹습니다. sc4sap은 이 과정을 질문 하나당 한 답으로 분해해, 셋업 마법사 안에서 끝냅니다.

  • 1
    MCP 서버 자동 설치 — abap-mcp-adt-powerup을 클론 · 빌드 · 등록합니다. claude_desktop_config.json을 직접 편집할 필요가 없습니다.
  • 2
    .sc4sap/sap.env 자동 생성 — SAP URL · 클라이언트 · 계정 · 인증 방식을 한 줄씩 묻고 저장. 비밀번호는 마스킹되며 sap.env.bak 백업이 남습니다.
  • 3
    버전·업종·국가 동기화 — SAP 버전 · ABAP 릴리즈 · 업종 · 국가 프로파일을 .sc4sap/config.json에 기록해 모든 에이전트가 같은 컨텍스트를 공유합니다.
  • 4
    권한 검증 — GetSession · GetInactiveObjects 라운드트립으로 ADT 권한까지 자동 확인합니다.
  • 5
    ZMCP_ADT_UTILS 유틸 함수그룹 생성 — 스크린 디스패처와 텍스트풀 R/W 모듈을 로컬 전용으로 설치합니다(이미 있으면 스킵).
  • 6
    데이터 추출 블록리스트 훅 등록 — settings.json에 훅을 심고, BNKA 스모크 테스트로 permissionDecision: deny가 정상 동작하는지 검증합니다.
$ /sc4sap:setup
→ 버전 체크 · Claude Code 호환성 확인
→ SAP 시스템: S4 / ECC ? S4
→ ABAP Release ? 756
→ Industry ? automotive
→ 국가 ? kr
→ MCP 서버 설치 중… ✓ done
→ SAP 연결 테스트… ✓ GetSession OK
→ ADT 권한 확인… ✓ OK
→ ZMCP_ADT_UTILS 생성… ✓ activated
→ 블록리스트 훅 등록… ✓ deny(BNKA) 확인

setup complete. ready to code.
한 줄 요약 — “설치 가이드대로 30분 삽질”을 “엔터 몇 번”으로 대체합니다.
Specialist

범용 AI 하나가 아닌, 역할별로 나뉜 25개 분야의 전문 Agent

sc4sap은 단일 프롬프트가 모든 결정을 내리지 않습니다. 업무 판단, 아키텍처 설계, 구현, 리뷰, 디버깅이 각각
역할이 분리된 전문 에이전트에게 위임되고, 필요하면 모듈 컨설턴트에게 다시 에스컬레이션됩니다.

CORE · 10

핵심 설계 · 구현 · 리뷰

분석 · 아키텍처 · 플래닝 · 실행 · 리뷰 · 크리틱 · 디버깅 · 테스트 · 문서 · 작성

BASIS · 1

시스템 · 트랜스포트 · 성능

BC Consultant — 관리, 전송 전략, 덤프 · 성능 튜닝 전담

MODULES · 14

모듈별 업무 판단 컨설턴트

Pricing · MRP · Batch · Payroll 등 모듈 고유 로직 위임

sap-analyst요구사항 분석, Fit-Gap, 인수 기준 정의
sap-architect기술 설계, ABAP 아키텍처, 통합 패턴

sap-code-reviewerClean ABAP · 성능 · 보안 리뷰

sap-debugger런타임 덤프 · 트랜스포트 오류 해결
sap-qa-testerABAP Unit · 통합 테스트 시나리오
sap-doc-specialistSAP Help · OSS Note · ABAP 키워드 문서 참조

Basis & Module Consultants

sap-bc-consultant SD MM FI CO PP PS PM QM WM TM TR HCM BW Ariba

위임 규칙 — 일반 SAP 지식으로 추론하지 않습니다

  • 모듈별 업무 판단이 필요하면 Analyst / Critic / Planner가 "## Module Consultation Needed" 블록을 띄워 해당 모듈 컨설턴트에게 질문을 넘깁니다.
  • 시스템 레벨 이슈(트랜스포트 · 권한 · 성능)는 Architect가 "## Consultation Needed"로 BC 컨설턴트에게 위임합니다.
  • Core 에이전트는 MCP 읽기 권한을 직접 보유 — 인계 없이 SAP 오브젝트를 그대로 조사합니다.
  • 모르는 것은 모듈 컨설턴트에게 묻도록 구조화되어 있어, "그럴싸한 SAP 지식"으로 답을 지어내는 경로 자체가 막혀 있습니다.
Development

Formatted Auto Program Maker
첫 커밋이 이미 컨벤션을 지키는 프로그램

/sc4sap:create-program은 아이디어 한 줄에서 활성화된 ABAP 오브젝트까지 이어지는 8단계 파이프라인입니다. 결과물은
"동작은 하는 초안"이 아니라 sc4sap 코딩 컨벤션을 처음부터 지키는 최종 코드입니다.

PHASE 3

스펙 작성 + 승인 게이트

사용자가 승인 / approve를 명시하기 전에는 넘어가지 않습니다.

PHASE 4

병렬 Include 생성 + 일괄 활성화

Main + 조건부 Include 병렬 생성 후 단일 Semantic Analysis + 배치 활성화. 개별 루프 대비 약 40–60% 단축.

PHASE 6

4버킷 병렬 컨벤션 리뷰

ALV+UI · Logic · Structure+Naming · Platform을 Sonnet으로 병렬 리뷰. MAJOR 발견 시에만 Opus 에스컬레이션.

PHASE 8

완료 리포트 (PASS 게이트)

Phase 6 PASS 조건부 완료 리포트. state.json 타이밍 테이블로 C-2 재개 지원.

→ 결과적으로 리뷰어의 일은 "컨벤션 보정"이 아니라 "비즈니스 로직 판단"에 쓰입니다.
처음부터 통과하는 코드를 만들기 때문에, 사람은 이 프로그램이 옳은 일을 하는가만 보면 됩니다.
Compare Programs

같은 일을 하는 프로그램이 왜 두 개, 세 개씩 돌아가는지

/sc4sap:compare-programs — 2~5개의 ABAP 프로그램을 동시에 로드해, 10개 차원에서 구조적으로 비교합니다.
"복사해서 고친 프로그램"과 "진짜 다른 프로그램"을 구별해, 통합 · 폐기 · 공통화 판단의 근거를 만듭니다.

/sc4sap:compare-programs · ZSDR0142 · ZSDR0188
A ZSDR0142 SD · 2019
  • ●목적·범위미수금 리포트
  • ◐선택 화면P_BUKRS · S_KUNNR
  • ●데이터 소스BSID + KNA1
  • ○출력 구조List (WRITE)
  • ◐메시지 처리MESSAGE I999
VS
B ZSDR0188 SD · 2023
  • ●목적·범위미수금 리포트
  • ◐선택 화면+ S_BLDAT 추가
  • ●데이터 소스BSID + KNA1
  • ○출력 구조CL_GUI_ALV_GRID
  • ◐메시지 처리BAL_LOG
● 동일 ◐ 차이 ○ 상반 10개 차원 중 5개 표시 · 실제 리포트는 목적·범위 / 선택화면 / 데이터소스 / 비즈니스로직 / 출력 / UI / 메시지 / 성능 / Text Element / CBO·Enhancement 전 차원 비교
VERDICT 효과. 수년간 "비슷한데 조금 다른" 3개의 Z 리포트가 떠돌던 프로젝트에서, 10차원 비교 리포트 하나로 통합·폐기·표준화 결정을 한 번에 내릴 수 있습니다. AI가 "새로 만들자"고 제안하기 전에, 이미 있는 프로그램을 먼저 본다는 원칙이 이 기능으로 운영까지 확장됩니다.
Reusability

CBO Reuse
이미 있는 Z 오브젝트를 AI가 다시 만들지 않도록

수년간 돌아온 SAP 시스템일수록 ZCL_* · ZFM_* · Z*_DE · 커스텀 구조체·테이블 타입이 수백 개씩 쌓여 있습니다.
이 자산을 모른 채 AI에게 개발을 맡기면 가장 흔한 사고 — 같은 기능의 Z 오브젝트를 또 만드는 것이 반복됩니다.
sc4sap은 이 문제를 파이프라인 앞단에서 차단합니다.

패션의 Style × Color × Size는 마스터 데이터 구조 자체가 다릅니다. sc4sap은 이 맥락을 에이전트가 자동으로 끌어 씁니다.

  • .sc4sap/config.json → industry / country 값이 세션 시작 시 자동 로드됩니다.
  • Analyst · Critic · Planner는 Country Context 블록을 mandatory하게 로드한 뒤 작업을 시작합니다.
  • 멀티 컨트리 롤아웃에서는 해당 파일을 모두 로드하고 인터컴퍼니 · EU 역내 VAT · 이전가격 같은 교차 접점을 자동으로 플래그합니다.

Active-Module Awareness — 모듈 조합에 따라 객체를 바꿔 씁니다

같은 "원가 분석"이라도 프로젝트가 MM + PS를 쓰면 WBS 기준, SD + CO를 쓰면 CO-PA 세그먼트 기준으로 달라집니다. sc4sap은 config.json의 activeModules 리스트를 근거로 조합별 표준 객체를 선택합니다.

MM + PS
프로젝트 구매 · 비용 집계

WBS 요소에 비용을 직접 집계. BANFN·EBELN의 PS_PSP_PNR 키로 프로젝트 귀속.

SD + CO
수익성 분석 (CO-PA)

주문·청구 기준 세그먼트(특성치) 채널로 전표 전기. 수량·금액을 CE1/CE4로 분해.

FI + TR
자금 · 하우스뱅크 통합

지급 제안 → TR 현금관리 → House Bank 이체. FEBAN·FF7A 연계 경로 자동 인지.

Fit to System

운영 현장이 실제로 원하는 세 가지 — 문서화 · 장애 대응 · 데이터 보호

생성 기능만으로는 현업 SAP 운영 환경에 녹아들기 어렵습니다. sc4sap은 신규 개발 외에 레거시 문서화, 장애 1차 분석,
엔터프라이즈급 데이터 보호까지 한 패키지 안에서 제공합니다.

📄

Reverse Engineering

레거시를 스펙으로 되돌리기
/sc4sap:analyze-code · /sc4sap:program-to-spec

  • Clean ABAP · 성능 · 보안 카테고리별 리뷰 리포트
  • 기능/기술 명세서(Markdown 또는 Excel) 자동 생성
  • Socratic 스코프 조정으로 "전부 문서화" 함정 회피
  • 수년간 미뤄진 레거시 문서화 작업이 분 단위로 압축
🩺

Operational Triage

Claude 안에서 끝내는 장애 분석
/sc4sap:analyze-symptom

  • ST22 덤프 — RuntimeListDumps / RuntimeAnalyzeDump
  • SM02 시스템 메시지 — RuntimeListSystemMessages
  • /IWFND/ERROR_LOG Gateway 오류 — RuntimeGetGatewayErrorLog
  • SAT 프로파일러 — RuntimeAnalyzeProfilerTrace
  • 스택 트레이스 분석 → SAP Note 후보 → 원인 가설 → 액션 선택지
🔒

Data Protection

4중 방어 + acknowledge_risk HARD RULE
PII · 급여 · 뱅킹 · 거래 재무 행 단위 유출 원천 차단

  • L1 에이전트 지시문 — 카테고리별 거부 + 대안 제시
  • L2 전역 CLAUDE.md — 모든 세션 자동 주입
  • L3 PreToolUse 훅 — 호출 차단 (deny)
  • L4 MCP 서버 내부 가드 — opt-in 서버 레벨 차단

4중 방어 레이어 구조

Layer위치역할
L1에이전트 지시문카테고리별 거부 + 대안 제시 (PII / HR / Banking / Transactional Finance ···)
L2CLAUDE.md 전역모든 세션에 자동 주입되는 Data Extraction Policy
L3Claude Code PreToolUse 훅permissionDecision: deny로 실제 MCP 호출 차단
L4MCP 서버 내부 가드서버 레벨에서 opt-in 차단 — 다른 클라이언트 호출도 봉쇄

블록리스트 프로파일 — 환경에 맞게 스코프 선택

strict

PII + 크리덴셜 + HR + 거래 재무 + 감사 로그 + 워크플로. 기본값.

standard

PII + 크리덴셜 + HR + 거래 재무. 일반 프로젝트 기본값.

minimal

PII + 크리덴셜 + HR + Tax. 업무 테이블 조회는 허용.

custom

.sc4sap/blocklist-custom.txt에 사용자 지정 리스트.

HARD RULE

acknowledge_risk — per-call · per-table · per-session 명시적 승인

GetTableContents / GetSqlQuery로 민감 테이블에 접근하려면, 사용자가 명시적 긍정 키워드로 허가해야 합니다.

인정되는 표현: yes 승인 authorize approve proceed confirmed

인정하지 않는 표현(모호한 명령): 뽑아봐 try it my mistake 해봐

승인은 호출 단위 · 테이블 단위 · 세션 단위로만 유효하며, 다음 요청으로 이월되지 않습니다. "AI가 실수로 민감 테이블을 뽑는 경로" 자체를 없애는 것이 설계 목표입니다.

▶ 게이트 체험 — 키워드를 클릭해 보세요
→ 위 키워드 중 하나를 클릭해 게이트 동작을 확인하세요.

70

72

74	~/.sc4sap/                                    ← user home (shared across repos)

If no legacy and no profiles exist → proceed to Step 1 for a fresh install. If profiles already exist → offer switch vs create-another. |
100	| 1 | **Version check** | Verify Claude Code version compatibility |
101	| 2 | **SAP system version + Industry** | Choose `S4` / `ECC`, enter ABAP release, pick industry from 15-option menu. Drives SPRO tables / BAPIs / TCodes + ABAP syntax gating + industry-specific configuration patterns. |
102	| 3 | **Install MCP server** | Clone + build `abap-mcp-adt-powerup` into `<PLUGIN_ROOT>/vendor/abap-mcp-adt/`. Skipped if already installed (`--update` to refresh). |

Delegate write to `sap-profile-cli.mjs add` → profile env under `~/.sc4sap/profiles/<alias>/`, password to OS keychain. Write `<project>/.sc4sap/active-profile.txt=<alias>`. NO file is written under `<project>/.sc4sap/sap.env` or `<project>/.sc4sap/config.json`. |
104	| 4bis | **RFC backend selection** | Pick `soap` / `native` / `gateway` / `odata` / `zrfc`. All `SAP_RFC_*` keys go into the active profile env. See [RFC backends](FEATURES.md#rfc-backend-selection). |
105	| 5 | **Reconnect MCP** | Prompt to run `/mcp`. The server's `ReloadProfile` tool reads the pointer + profile env (with keychain resolution) and refreshes the cached connection — no Claude Code restart needed. |
106	| 6 | **Test connection** | `GetSession` round-trip against SAP. |
107	| 7 | **Confirm system info** | Show system ID, client, user, language. Persist into `~/.sc4sap/profiles/<alias>/config.json → systemInfo` (not the project folder). |
108	| 8 | **ADT authority check** | `GetInactiveObjects` to verify ADT permissions. |
109	| **9** | **Create ABAP utility objects (tier-gated)** | **DEV only.** Installs `ZMCP_ADT_UTILS` FG + `ZIF_S4SAP_CM` / `ZCL_S4SAP_CM_*` ALV OOP handlers (+ OData / ZRFC classes if chosen at 4bis). System-deduped by `SAP_URL + SAP_CLIENT`: a sibling DEV profile on the same host reuses the install. On **QA / PRD** Step 9 REFUSES and prints CTS import guidance — transport the utilities from the matching DEV system via the standard TMS route. |
110	| 10 | **Finalize profile `config.json`** | Write `sapVersion`, `abapRelease`, `industry`, `activeModules`, `namingConvention`, `blocklistProfile`, `activeTransport` into `~/.sc4sap/profiles/<alias>/config.json`. The project `<project>/.sc4sap/` never contains a `config.json` in multi-profile mode. |
111	| 11 | **SPRO extraction (optional)** | `y/N` — token-heavy; caches into `<project>/.sc4sap/work/<alias>/spro-config.json`. Future skills reuse the cache. |
112	| 11b | **Customization inventory (optional)** | `y/N` — scans `Z*`/`Y*` enhancements + append structures; writes `<project>/.sc4sap/work/<alias>/customizations/{MODULE}/{enhancements,extensions}.json`. |
113	| **12** | **🔒 PreToolUse hooks (MANDATORY)** | Installs BOTH `block-forbidden-tables.mjs` (row-extraction guard) AND `tier-readonly-guard.mjs` (tier-based mutation guard) into `.claude/settings.json` via `node scripts/install-hooks.mjs --project`. Smoke-tests both. Setup does not complete unless both succeed. |
114	| 13 | **HUD status line** | Register the sc4sap status line in `~/.claude/settings.json`. After restart, the HUD shows `{alias} [{tier}] {🔒 if readonly}` + token usage. |
115	
116	> **Defense in depth — three enforcement layers for safe operation**
117	> - **L1a (step 12, row extraction)** — Claude Code `PreToolUse` hook. Profile in `~/.sc4sap/profiles/<alias>/config.json → blocklistProfile`. Denies `GetTableContents` / `GetSqlQuery` on sensitive tables.
118	> - **L1b (step 12, tier)** — Claude Code `PreToolUse` hook. Reads `SAP_TIER` from active profile every call (stateless). Denies mutations on QA/PRD.
119	> - **L2 (MCP server, uncircumventable)** — `abap-mcp-adt-powerup` internal guard. Row extraction via `sap.env → MCP_BLOCKLIST_PROFILE`; tier via `@readonly(tier)` decorator set at `ReloadProfile` time. Fires even if the hooks are missing or misconfigured.
120	>
121	> Both L1 hooks fail OPEN on IO/parse errors; the L2 MCP guard is always active. Typical default: L1a `strict`, MCP-server blocklist `standard`.

124	
125	### Working with profiles
126	
127	- Switch active system: `/sc4sap:sap-option switch <alias>` (or interactive picker — uses `AskUserQuestion`, previews tier + allowed-tool matrix)
128	- Add another company or tier: `/sc4sap:sap-option add` (wizard: alias → tier → optional same-company meta-copy → connection + keychain password capture)
129	- List profiles: `/sc4sap:sap-option list` — shows each alias, tier badge, host, and a `●` marker for the active one
130	- Remove / rotate / purge: `/sc4sap:sap-option remove|edit|purge` — soft-delete goes to `~/.sc4sap/profiles/.trash/<alias>-<ts>/` with 7-day auto-purge
131	- Tier is immutable on an existing profile — change by remove + add
132	
133	### Health & maintenance
134	
135	- Verify health: `/sc4sap:sap-doctor`
136	- Rotate credentials / change industry / adjust L2 MCP blocklist: `/sc4sap:sap-option`
137	- Re-extract SPRO later: `/sc4sap:setup spro` (requires an active profile)
138	- Re-run customization inventory: `/sc4sap:setup customizations` (requires an active profile)
139	
140	### Migration rollback (if you regret the 0.6.0 upgrade)
141	
142	```bash
143	mv .sc4sap/sap.env.legacy .sc4sap/sap.env
144	rm .sc4sap/active-profile.txt
145	rm -rf ~/.sc4sap/profiles/<alias>
146	# If password was stored in the keychain (not plaintext fallback):
147	echo '{"service":"sc4sap","account":"<alias>/<user>"}' \
148	  | node "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/scripts/sap-profile-cli.mjs" keychain-delete
149	```
150	
151	---

← [Back to README](../README.md)

## Requirements

![Node.js](https://img.shields.io/badge/Node.js-%3E%3D%2020.0.0-339933?logo=node.js&logoColor=white)
![Claude Code](https://img.shields.io/badge/Claude_Code-CLI-6B4FBB?logo=anthropic&logoColor=white)
![SAP ECC](https://img.shields.io/badge/SAP-ECC_6.0-0FAAFF?logo=sap&logoColor=white)
![SAP S/4HANA](https://img.shields.io/badge/SAP-S%2F4HANA_On--Premise-0FAAFF?logo=sap&logoColor=white)
![SAP S/4HANA Cloud](https://img.shields.io/badge/SAP-S%2F4HANA_Cloud-0FAAFF?logo=sap&logoColor=white)
![MCP ABAP ADT](https://img.shields.io/badge/MCP_ABAP_ADT-Auto--Installed-FF6600)

| Requirement | Details |
|-------------|---------|
| **Node.js** | >= 20.0.0 |
| **Claude Code** | CLI installed (Max/Pro subscription or API key) |
| **SAP System** | **SAP ECC 6.0** / **S/4HANA On-Premise** / **S/4HANA Cloud (Public & Private)** — ADT enabled |

> **MCP Server** ([abap-mcp-adt-powerup](https://github.com/babamba2/abap-mcp-adt-powerup)) is **automatically installed and configured** during `/sc4sap:setup` — no manual pre-install required.

## Installation

> **Note** — sc4sap is **not yet on the official Claude Code plugin marketplace**. For now, add this repository as a custom marketplace in Claude Code, then install the plugin from it.

### Option A — Add as custom marketplace (recommended)

Inside a Claude Code session, run:

```
/plugin marketplace add https://github.com/babamba2/superclaude-for-sap.git
/plugin install sc4sap
```

To update later:

```
/plugin marketplace update babamba2/superclaude-for-sap
/plugin install sc4sap
```

### Option B — Install from source

```bash
git clone https://github.com/babamba2/superclaude-for-sap.git
cd superclaude-for-sap
npm install && npm run build
```

Then point Claude Code at the local plugin directory via `/plugin marketplace add <local-path>`.

## Setup

```bash
# Run the setup skill — walks you through the wizard one question at a time
/sc4sap:setup
```

### Subcommands

```bash
/sc4sap:setup                # full wizard (default)
/sc4sap:setup doctor         # route to /sc4sap:sap-doctor
/sc4sap:setup mcp            # route to /sc4sap:mcp-setup
/sc4sap:setup spro           # SPRO config auto-extraction only
/sc4sap:setup customizations # Z*/Y* enhancement + extension inventory only
```

### Multi-profile architecture (0.6.0+)

sc4sap supports multiple SAP connections (Dev / QA / Prod across one or more companies) in the same Claude Code session.

```
~/.sc4sap/                                    ← user home (shared across repos)
└── profiles/
    ├── KR-DEV/{sap.env, config.json}         ← one profile per connection
    ├── KR-QA/ {sap.env, config.json}
    └── KR-PRD/{sap.env, config.json}

<project>/.sc4sap/                            ← project root (engagement-scoped)
├── active-profile.txt                        ← "KR-DEV"
└── work/
    ├── KR-DEV/{program, cbo, customizations, ...}
    └── KR-PRD/{...}
```

Tier enum (`DEV` / `QA` / `PRD`) drives readonly enforcement: QA/PRD profiles block `Create*` / `Update*` / `Delete*` at two layers — a PreToolUse hook (L1, pre-wire) and the MCP server's own guard (L2, uncircumventable). QA/PRD profiles also REFUSE Step 9 ABAP utility installation; transport the utilities in via CTS from the matching DEV profile instead.

Passwords are stored in the OS keychain (Windows Credential Manager / macOS Keychain / Linux libsecret) via `@napi-rs/keyring`. When the keychain is unavailable (headless / Docker / missing optional dep), sc4sap transparently falls back to plaintext in the profile env and warns the user.

Full design: [`multi-profile-design.md`](multi-profile-design.md). Artifact resolution rules: [`../common/multi-profile-artifact-resolution.md`](../common/multi-profile-artifact-resolution.md).

### Wizard Steps

The wizard asks **one question at a time** — never dumps the whole questionnaire. Existing profile values are shown so you can press Enter to keep them.

| # | Step | What happens |
|---|------|--------------|
| **0** | **Legacy detection & profile bootstrap** | Runs BEFORE any question. Calls `sap-profile-cli.mjs detect-legacy`. If a pre-0.6.0 `<project>/.sc4sap/sap.env` is found → routes into a migration flow (ask `alias` + `tier`, run `sap-profile-cli.mjs migrate`, archive to `sap.env.legacy`, delete project `config.json`, point `active-profile.txt` at the new profile, resume at Step 5). If no legacy and no profiles exist → proceed to Step 1 for a fresh install. If profiles already exist → offer switch vs create-another. |
| 1 | **Version check** | Verify Claude Code version compatibility |
| 2 | **SAP system version + Industry** | Choose `S4` / `ECC`, enter ABAP release, pick industry from 15-option menu. Drives SPRO tables / BAPIs / TCodes + ABAP syntax gating + industry-specific configuration patterns. |
| 3 | **Install MCP server** | Clone + build `abap-mcp-adt-powerup` into `<PLUGIN_ROOT>/vendor/abap-mcp-adt/`. Skipped if already installed (`--update` to refresh). |
| **4** | **Profile creation & SAP connection** | Collect `alias` (`^[A-Z0-9_-]+$`, suggest `{ISO-COUNTRY}-{TIER}` e.g. `KR-DEV`), `SAP_TIER` (`DEV`/`QA`/`PRD`), optional same-company meta-copy from a sibling profile, then connection fields (`SAP_URL`, `SAP_CLIENT`, `SAP_AUTH_TYPE`, `SAP_USERNAME`, `SAP_PASSWORD`, `SAP_LANGUAGE`, `SAP_SYSTEM_TYPE`) one at a time. Delegate write to `sap-profile-cli.mjs add` → profile env under `~/.sc4sap/profiles/<alias>/`, password to OS keychain. Write `<project>/.sc4sap/active-profile.txt=<alias>`. NO file is written under `<project>/.sc4sap/sap.env` or `<project>/.sc4sap/config.json`. |
| 4bis | **RFC backend selection** | Pick `soap` / `native` / `gateway` / `odata` / `zrfc`. All `SAP_RFC_*` keys go into the active profile env. See [RFC backends](FEATURES.md#rfc-backend-selection). |
| 5 | **Reconnect MCP** | Prompt to run `/mcp`. The server's `ReloadProfile` tool reads the pointer + profile env (with keychain resolution) and refreshes the cached connection — no Claude Code restart needed. |
| 6 | **Test connection** | `GetSession` round-trip against SAP. |
| 7 | **Confirm system info** | Show system ID, client, user, language. Persist into `~/.sc4sap/profiles/<alias>/config.json → systemInfo` (not the project folder). |
| 8 | **ADT authority check** | `GetInactiveObjects` to verify ADT permissions. |
| **9** | **Create ABAP utility objects (tier-gated)** | **DEV only.** Installs `ZMCP_ADT_UTILS` FG + `ZIF_S4SAP_CM` / `ZCL_S4SAP_CM_*` ALV OOP handlers (+ OData / ZRFC classes if chosen at 4bis). System-deduped by `SAP_URL + SAP_CLIENT`: a sibling DEV profile on the same host reuses the install. On **QA / PRD** Step 9 REFUSES and prints CTS import guidance — transport the utilities from the matching DEV system via the standard TMS route. |
| 10 | **Finalize profile `config.json`** | Write `sapVersion`, `abapRelease`, `industry`, `activeModules`, `namingConvention`, `blocklistProfile`, `activeTransport` into `~/.sc4sap/profiles/<alias>/config.json`. The project `<project>/.sc4sap/` never contains a `config.json` in multi-profile mode. |
| 11 | **SPRO extraction (optional)** | `y/N` — token-heavy; caches into `<project>/.sc4sap/work/<alias>/spro-config.json`. Future skills reuse the cache. |
| 11b | **Customization inventory (optional)** | `y/N` — scans `Z*`/`Y*` enhancements + append structures; writes `<project>/.sc4sap/work/<alias>/customizations/{MODULE}/{enhancements,extensions}.json`. |
| **12** | **🔒 PreToolUse hooks (MANDATORY)** | Installs BOTH `block-forbidden-tables.mjs` (row-extraction guard) AND `tier-readonly-guard.mjs` (tier-based mutation guard) into `.claude/settings.json` via `node scripts/install-hooks.mjs --project`. Smoke-tests both. Setup does not complete unless both succeed. |
| 13 | **HUD status line** | Register the sc4sap status line in `~/.claude/settings.json`. After restart, the HUD shows `{alias} [{tier}] {🔒 if readonly}` + token usage. |

> **Defense in depth — three enforcement layers for safe operation**
> - **L1a (step 12, row extraction)** — Claude Code `PreToolUse` hook. Profile in `~/.sc4sap/profiles/<alias>/config.json → blocklistProfile`. Denies `GetTableContents` / `GetSqlQuery` on sensitive tables.
> - **L1b (step 12, tier)** — Claude Code `PreToolUse` hook. Reads `SAP_TIER` from active profile every call (stateless). Denies mutations on QA/PRD.
> - **L2 (MCP server, uncircumventable)** — `abap-mcp-adt-powerup` internal guard. Row extraction via `sap.env → MCP_BLOCKLIST_PROFILE`; tier via `@readonly(tier)` decorator set at `ReloadProfile` time. Fires even if the hooks are missing or misconfigured.
>
> Both L1 hooks fail OPEN on IO/parse errors; the L2 MCP guard is always active. Typical default: L1a `strict`, MCP-server blocklist `standard`.

## After Setup

### Working with profiles

- Switch active system: `/sc4sap:sap-option switch <alias>` (or interactive picker — uses `AskUserQuestion`, previews tier + allowed-tool matrix)
- Add another company or tier: `/sc4sap:sap-option add` (wizard: alias → tier → optional same-company meta-copy → connection + keychain password capture)
- List profiles: `/sc4sap:sap-option list` — shows each alias, tier badge, host, and a `●` marker for the active one
- Remove / rotate / purge: `/sc4sap:sap-option remove|edit|purge` — soft-delete goes to `~/.sc4sap/profiles/.trash/<alias>-<ts>/` with 7-day auto-purge
- Tier is immutable on an existing profile — change by remove + add

### Health & maintenance

- Verify health: `/sc4sap:sap-doctor`
- Rotate credentials / change industry / adjust L2 MCP blocklist: `/sc4sap:sap-option`
- Re-extract SPRO later: `/sc4sap:setup spro` (requires an active profile)
- Re-run customization inventory: `/sc4sap:setup customizations` (requires an active profile)

### Migration rollback (if you regret the 0.6.0 upgrade)

```bash
mv .sc4sap/sap.env.legacy .sc4sap/sap.env
rm .sc4sap/active-profile.txt
rm -rf ~/.sc4sap/profiles/<alias>
# If password was stored in the keychain (not plaintext fallback):
echo '{"service":"sc4sap","account":"<alias>/<user>"}' \
  | node "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/scripts/sap-profile-cli.mjs" keychain-delete
```

content.text:
Hero `h1`/`h2`/`h2.sub` 사이에 install snippet이 자연스럽게 들어갔습니다. 정리:

**삽입 위치** — `index.html:81–82` 사이 ("SAP 패러다임의 대전환" h2 ↔ "sc4sap — Claude Code를 SAP 풀스택…" h2 사이)

**구조**
- 좌측: 세로 탭 셀렉터 (Windows / macOS / Linux / npm) — 각각 OS 아이콘 SVG
- 우측: 코드 패널 — 상단 바에 OS 라벨 + Copy 버튼, 본문에 3-스텝 명령 (Claude Code 설치 → `claude` 실행 → `/plugin marketplace add` + `/plugin install sc4sap`)

**4개 탭 명령**
1. **Windows** — `irm https://claude.ai/install.ps1 | iex`
2. **macOS** — `curl -fsSL https://claude.ai/install.sh | bash`
3. **Linux** — 동일 curl
4. **npm** — `npm install -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code`

**테마 대응** — `tokens.css` 변수만 사용 + `[data-theme="dark"]` 오버라이드 블록으로 코드 배경(`#F4F6FA` ↔ `#071328`), 탭/구분선/Copy 버튼/구문 색상 모두 라이트·다크에서 자연스럽게 전환. 우측 상단 테마 토글로 즉시 검증 가능.

**JS** — `js/main.js`에 `initInstallBlock()` 추가: 탭 클릭/방향키 전환 + `code[data-raw]`에서 plain-text 복사(시각용 `<span>` 태그 제거된 원본). Copy 후 1.6초 동안 "Copied" 라벨 + green 보더 피드백.

**모바일** — 640px 이하에서 세로 탭이 가로 스크롤 바로 자동 변환.

브라우저에서 `index.html` 열어 라이트/다크 토글로 확인해 보시고, 명령 텍스트(예: marketplace URL)나 탭 라벨/순서 바꾸고 싶은 부분 있으면 말씀 주세요.
